title: koeleria rochelii
intro: Koeleria rochelii, also known as Bunchgrass or Koeler's Hair Grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Koeleria rochelii has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
